title: Buttery Dense Irish Beef Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew featuring tender beef, rich butter, and a hint of light rum, perfect for a comforting meal. This keto-friendly dish is simmered to perfection and is suitable for kids.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of butter in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
Add the remaining 4 tablespoons of butter to the pot and melt. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped carrots and celery and cook for 5 minutes, until they begin to soften.
Add the light rum to the pot and stir to deglaze, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Add the beef broth, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper to the pot. Stir to combine.
Return the browned beef to the pot and bring the stew to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2.5 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
